/Users/larsens/Github/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -sUSE_SDL=2 -sUSE_SDL_MIXER=2 -fexceptions -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sMAX_WEBGL_VERSION=1 -sSTACK_SIZE=1048576 -lidbfs.js -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=FS --preload-file /Users/larsens/Github/soulride-sdl2-gles2/data@/data --preload-file /Users/larsens/Github/soulride-sdl2-gles2/Recordings@/Recordings --preload-file /Users/larsens/Github/soulride-sdl2-gles2/config.txt@/config.txt --pre-js /Users/larsens/Github/soulride-sdl2-gles2/web/prejs.js --shell-file /Users/larsens/Github/soulride-sdl2-gles2/web/shell.html @CMakeFiles/soulride.dir/objects1.rsp -o soulride.html @CMakeFiles/soulride.dir/linkLibs.rsp
